title: Delivery Roadmap
description: Gate 9 — machine-readable delivery roadmap for programmatic consumption by PMO dashboards, CI pipelines, and reporting tools.

gate.description: Gate number. Always 9 for delivery roadmaps.

feature.description: Feature slug matching the directory name under docs/pre-dev/. Used as the unique identifier across all PMO artifacts.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this roadmap was generated. Used for cache invalidation and audit trails.

startDate.description: ISO 8601 date when implementation starts (first task begins).

endDate.description: ISO 8601 date when all tasks are expected to be complete (including contingency buffer).

mvpEndDate.description: ISO 8601 date for MVP subset completion, if the feature has a distinct MVP phase. Null if no MVP split.

totalDuration.description: Human-readable total project duration in working days (includes contingency buffer).

velocity.description: Team velocity parameters used to calculate calendar estimates from AI estimates.

teamSize.description: Number of developers actively working on this feature.

utilizationRate.description: Fraction of working hours actually available for this feature (0.0–1.0). Accounts for meetings, context switching, etc.

humanValidationMultiplier.description: Multiplier applied to AI estimates to account for human review, testing, iteration, and unexpected issues. Typical range: 1.3–2.0.

multiplierSource.description: Source of the humanValidationMultiplier. 'default' means team default; 'historical' means derived from past feature data.

deliveryCadence.description: How delivery is structured: continuous (ship when done) or sprint-based.

type.description: Delivery model. 'continuous' = ship each task as it completes. 'sprint' = deliver at sprint boundaries.

periodDuration.description: Duration of each sprint period (e.g., '2 weeks'). Null if type is 'continuous'.

periodStartDate.description: Start date of the first sprint period. Null if type is 'continuous'.

tasks.description: Ordered list of implementation tasks. Each task corresponds to a T-NNN entry in gate-7-tasks.md.

description.description: Short description of the task deliverable. Should match the task title in gate-7-tasks.md.

aiEstimate.description: Raw AI-generated estimate before applying humanValidationMultiplier (e.g., '4h').

adjusted.description: Estimate after applying humanValidationMultiplier (aiEstimate × multiplier). Format: '6.0h'.

calendar.description: Wall-clock hours accounting for utilizationRate (adjusted ÷ utilizationRate). Format: '6.67h'.

days.description: Working days equivalent of calendar hours (calendar ÷ 9h/day). Format: '0.83d'.

dependencies.description: List of task IDs that must complete before this task can start. Empty array if no dependencies.

assignee.description: Role or team responsible for this task. Values: Backend | Frontend | DevOps | QA | Fullstack.

status.description: Current task status. 'ready' = can start immediately. 'blocked' = waiting for dependencies.

onCriticalPath.description: Whether this task is on the critical path (its delay directly delays the project end date).

milestones.description: Project milestones grouping related tasks. Each milestone represents a meaningful delivery checkpoint.

startDate.description: Date when work on this milestone's tasks begins.

targetDate.description: Date by which all tasks in this milestone should be complete.

taskIds.description: List of task IDs (T-NNN) included in this milestone.

deliverable.description: Plain-language description of what is delivered when this milestone is complete. Suitable for stakeholder communication.
deliverable.example: Traefik em execução, Django proxy-ready, porta 7861 fechada

spillOvers.description: Task IDs that were planned for this milestone but spilled over to the next. Empty array at planning time.

criticalPath.description: Critical path analysis: the sequence of tasks whose total duration determines the minimum project duration.

taskIds.description: Ordered list of task IDs forming the critical path (longest dependency chain).

totalDuration.description: Sum of working days for tasks on the critical path (sequential execution).

minimumProjectDuration.description: Minimum calendar duration to complete the project with the current team size (critical path + contingency buffer).

risks.description: Risk register for this feature. Each entry covers one or more tasks.

taskIds.description: Task IDs affected by this risk.

level.description: Risk level combining probability and impact. Values: low | medium | high | critical.

impact.description: Description of what happens if this risk materialises. Should be specific and concrete.
impact.example: Má configuração quebra resolução de tenant

mitigation.description: Concrete mitigation action(s) to reduce likelihood or impact.
mitigation.example: Subtask fornece YAML exacto; testar com docker-compose up localmente antes de prosseguir

contingencyBuffer.description: Buffer added to the total estimate to account for unplanned work and risk materialisation.

percentage.description: Buffer as a percentage of total adjusted estimate. Typical values: 10–25%.

days.description: Buffer converted to working days (total adjusted days × percentage ÷ 100).

confidenceScore.description: Overall confidence in the roadmap estimates (0–100). Derived from task confidence levels, risk profile, and team familiarity with the domain. 80+ = high confidence; 60–79 = medium; <60 = low.
